steps.title: Connect one solution to the discriminant
steps.content: A quadratic has exactly one real solution when its discriminant is $0$. For $-3x^2+24x+c=0$, use $a=-3$ and $b=24$.

steps.title: Check the one-solution condition
steps.content: A zero discriminant means the parabola touches the $x$-axis once instead of crossing twice or missing it. With $c=-48$, the discriminant is $576+12(-48)=0$.
